name: hcc-dysrhythmia-suspect
description: HCC004v1 - Dysrhythmia Suspect: surfaces a protocol card recommending a dysrhythmia-related diagnosis when a patient has an active antiarrhythmic medication but no active dysrhythmia condition.

protocols.description: Recommends adding a dysrhythmia-related diagnosis when an antiarrhythmic medication is present without a corresponding active condition.

meta.title: Dysrhythmia Suspects
meta.description: All patients with potential dysrhythmia based on an active medication without associated active problem.
